title: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q
display_title: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q
wikitext:
[]: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sat Jun 01, 2019 3:30 am Today at 20:00 Japan time. Preceded by Yoko Takahashi singing. Some first screens (also this is a "water spectacle" or whatever you call these, the image is projected onto water, sounds really cool): https://twitter.com/evangelion_co/status/1134731731741712384?s=19 https://twitter.com/evangelion_co/status/1134645611351830528?s=19 https://twitter.com/khara_inc/status/1134734196323233795?s=19 Bottom right pic you can see actual genga for this animation: https://twitter.com/eva_information/status/1134418084922400768?s=19 This is also being done (I think) to celebrate both, Yoko Takahashi's recently released mini album Evangelion Extreme and the opening of a new Eva Store (which Anno did a small drawing for: https://twitter.com/khara_inc2/status/1134639843621842944?s=19 )

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Jun 02, 2019 1:12 am This is cool! Totally slipped my radar, so thanks for sharing!

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jun 02, 2019 2:45 am :D I wonder if we will get to see the whole thing? Khara has only shared these little snippets online so far.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by robersora » Sun Jun 02, 2019 6:21 am I'd guess maybe as a special feature on Evangelion Final? Or maybe they'll experiment with streaming for marketing Shin Evangelion.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Mon Jun 03, 2019 12:44 pm It seems this was shown a second time. And from the tweets I got a took a year to make. It would be a shame to not release it to the world imo. Hopefully it really is a special feature or they upload it to their channel.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by robersora » Tue Jun 04, 2019 8:40 am kuribo-04 wrote: And from the tweets I got a took a year to make. It would be a shame to not release it to the world imo.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Jun 04, 2019 5:13 pm Yeah, I saw it! It does exactly what it's meant to do. Leave me wanting to watch the rest lol. The excitement of the people there is infectious too.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jun 08, 2019 9:18 pm Looks like something for one of the amusement park type things, isn't it?

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Sun Jun 09, 2019 2:51 am Honestly I am not entirely sure what it really is haha. Because we've seen so little. Was it meant for this one event or will it be reused? We don't even know how long it is or if it has an actual story. (Apparently they worked one year on it though..)

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Jul 25, 2019 4:04 am Several pics of the projection in this thread: https://twitter.com/kobax27/status/1142 ... 58433?s=19

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by Cookie H Wilson » Wed Jul 31, 2019 2:31 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=d9xn3xthjTA

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by robersora » Wed Jul 31, 2019 4:29 pm ^ ah, cool! Thanks for sharing. What a weird compilation of all Evangelion set pieces... Including Shinji smiling...? lol! Reminds me of the storylines of the Evangelion Pachinko machines.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Aug 15, 2019 1:25 am So is "Rebuild" becoming the official English term? https://twitter.com/eva_information/status/1161472698704388097?s=19

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by robersora » Fri Aug 16, 2019 1:25 am It's the official English term for when they are talking about the making-offs.

[]: Re: New Eva animation by Project Studio Q             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Aug 16, 2019 3:22 am Oh, so it's meant to signify that this is an interview about how the short film was made.
